This classification indicates that it belongs to the plant kingdom, specifically the subgroup of vascular plants. Further classification places it within the class Polypodiopsida and the order Polypodiales. Nephrodium obliteratum is a member of the family Matoniaceae and is closely related to other extinct and living species of ferns.
